experiences.summary: Full stack (LAMP), mobile, and rich media/digital signage application development.
description: Ownership of feature and defect resolution across RESTful APIs, Electron applications, mobile development, and web development in an Agile, startup-like environment
Enhancing Android and iOS applications by implementing new features, resolving defects, optimizing performance, and incorporating accessibility for screen readers
Developing signage software for multiple OSs to fully integrate equipment from third-parties such as BrightSign, Sony, and Logitech into the company's ecosystem
Modernized Electron and Laravel applications via refactoring, dependency upgrading, and pioneering testing suites
Pair-programming for code quality and knowledge transfer, while also interfacing with external parties to discuss technical requirements

experiences.summary: General involvement with HR tasks, talent acquisition, and scripting.
description: Automated HR timekeeping system, reducing time spent on manually calculating payroll and PTO
Leveraged Google Apps Script to automate/streamline workflows in Google Sheets and Google Calendar
Provided technical support by troubleshooting and repairing hardware/software malfunctions
